reporting requirements.
EP_COUNT_VM Num of EPs in practice for the VM Number of eligible professionals (EPs) in practice for purposes of Value Modifier calculated as minimum of number EPs billing under practice and number of EPs identified via PECOS 48 Num 8 
EP_COUNT Num of EPs in Part B claims for practice Number of eligible professionals in Part B claims in a practice, used to determine the number of eligible professionals in a practice for the purposes of the Value Modifier 49 Num 8
